name: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
original_name: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
overview: Welcome to the Ocean State. It may be America’s smallest, but don’t be fooled — the drama is wicked wild. In a place where everyone knows everyone and family names carry serious weight, nothing is ever truly forgotten. Friendships are built over decades, loyalties are deeply rooted and secrets are guarded at all costs…until betrayal strikes and the cracks begin to show.

trailers.title: Your First Look at The Real Housewives of Rhode Island Season 1 | RHORI (S1) | Bravo
